prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic action photo of a young man mid-jump above a rooftop at golden-hour sunset, captured from a dramatic low angle against a glowing orange sky filled with scattered clouds. He is centered in the frame, airborne with both knees bent, wearing a woven straw hat, an open bright red overshirt flaring in the wind, a white tank top, dark loose cargo-style pants, rugged dark boots, layered necklaces, fingerless gloves, and a belt with a launcher holster clipped at his waist. His right arm is thrust toward the camera, launching a spinning top toy on a visible ripcord, with the toy in the extreme foreground on the right side rendered large and motion-blurred for depth and speed. Place a transparent plastic Beyblade battle stadium at the bottom foreground, catching warm reflections from the sunset, with the clearly visible printed logo text BEYBLADE X. The city skyline stretches across the lower background with several high-rise buildings silhouetted by the setting sun near the horizon. Lighting is intensely warm and backlit, with strong rim light, cinematic contrast, subtle lens flare, and dynamic fabric movement. The composition should feel like a live-action promotional poster for Beyblade X, emphasizing energy, youth, speed, and urban rooftop competition, in vertical poster format.
